ai-w8-e1.answer: Paste controller code. Ask for OpenAPI-style doc. Compare with springdoc output.
ai-w8-e1.realWorld: Accurate docs = fewer Slack questions from frontend.

ai-w8-e2.answer: Describe your API. Ask REST design review: nouns, verbs, status codes. Fix one endpoint.

ai-w8-e3.answer: List endpoints. Ask for better names and URI structure. Apply one rename with deprecation plan.

ai-w8-e4.answer: Ask when to use 200, 201, 400, 401, 404, 500. Map each to your API scenario.
ai-w8-e4.realWorld: 201 + Location header on create; 404 when student id not found.

ai-w8-e5.answer: Generate Postman tests for login + protected route. Import and run.
ai-w8-e5.realWorld: Test script stores JWT from login, uses in next request header.

ai-w8-e6.answer: Ask sample JSON request bodies for your DTOs. Validate against @Valid annotations.
ai-w8-e6.realWorld: Missing required field → 400 with field errors — test that case.

ai-w8-e7.answer: List validation rules AI suggests: email format, password length, @NotNull. Add to DTO.

ai-w8-e8.answer: REST checklist: stateless, cache headers, HATEOAS optional, consistent errors. Score your API.
ai-w8-e8.realWorld: Same error JSON shape on all 400s — {code, message, field}.

ai-w8-e9.answer: Paste API with hardcoded secrets or no auth. Ask security review. Fix findings.
ai-w8-e9.realWorld: API key in query string → move to Authorization header.

ai-w8-e10.answer: Ask REST architecture: client, gateway, service, DB. Draw for your project.
ai-w8-e10.realWorld: Mobile → API Gateway → Spring Boot → PostgreSQL — interview whiteboard staple.
